authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(114) — Purisima Creek (San Mateo Co.)
sources.quotedText: (114) Purisima Creek (San Mateo Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 253798, "Purisima Creek", Stream, San Mateo Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":253798,"gaz_name":"Purisima Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"San Mateo"} — geometry multipoint; first point (Web Mercator -13628565.676, 4495585.6915) converts to lon -122.427488, lat 37.404114, near the creek's mouth at the Pacific Ocean south of Miramontes Point, matching Wikipedia's infobox coordinate (37.404109°N 122.427475°W); replacing the file's previous coordinate (-122.3706, 37.4375), which was off by ~6.25 km.
